overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at night, passing guards with torches, exiting through a wooden gate, traversing a forest path, crossing a stone bridge over water, and approaching a new settlement area. The scene features atmospheric lighting with torchlight illuminating the dark blue-green environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street toward guards holding torches

guard standing to the side holding a lit torch

armored guard holding a flaming torch illuminating the path
unpaved dirt road through the village center
wooden palisade fence lining the village path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow medieval village street at night. Wooden houses line the path while two armored guards with torches stand ahead, casting flickering orange light on the dirt road. The camera follows the character as he approaches the stationary guards.

events.description: passing through wooden gate from enclosed village to open forest area
exiting sheltered village buildings into more open forest with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden gate leaving the village behind

entered.detail: large wooden village gate with vertical beams marking the exit
tall dark pine trees marking the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a large wooden gate, transitioning from the enclosed village to the forest beyond. The wooden fence continues alongside the path as pine trees become visible in the distance, and the sky becomes partially visible above.

events.description: approaching and passing a patrol of two guards walking with torches

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest dirt path approaching a guard patrol

notable_agents.action: guard walking with torch moving in opposite direction
guard walking with torch moving in opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden fence continuing along the right side of the forest path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a dense pine forest. Two guards with torches approach from the opposite direction, their flames cutting through the darkness. The wooden fence continues along the right side as the path winds through the trees.

events.description: transitioning from dirt forest path onto cobblestone bridge
passing a guard with shield standing on the right side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge over dark water

notable_agents.action: guard with red shield standing guard on the bridge

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge with weathered stone blocks forming the path
wooden railing with vertical posts along the bridge edge
dark water visible below the bridge on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a cobblestone bridge spanning dark water. Wooden railings line both sides of the narrow bridge. A guard with a red shield stands watch on the right side as the character crosses the span, with the forest falling away behind.

events.description: exiting stone bridge onto dirt path approaching settlement

agents.ego_description: walking off the bridge toward a settlement area with guards ahead

notable_agents.action: guard with torch standing by the left side of the path
guard with torch standing ahead on the right side

entered.detail: wooden structure with warm light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the stone bridge onto a dirt path, leaving the water behind. The scene opens into a wider forest area with a wooden building visible ahead on the right, glowing with warm light. Guards with torches stand along the path ahead as the character approaches the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed streets of a medieval village into a dark pine forest and across a river toward a new settlement. It begins on a narrow dirt road lined with wooden houses, moving toward armored guards whose torches cast a flickering orange glow against the night. As the character passes through a large wooden gate, the enclosed village opens into a dense forest where the path winds past pine trees and oncoming torch-bearing guards. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto a narrow cobblestone bridge with wooden railings, crossing over dark water while passing a guard with a red shield. Finally, the camera exits the bridge onto a dirt path that opens into a wider woodland area, leading toward a glowing wooden building and a line of guards marking the entrance to the next settlement.
